_meta.description: Context facts that live in the memory store but are NOT deletion targets. Two roles: 'entailing' facts are the operands that let a multi-hop target be re-derived (referenced by multi_hop_facts.json -> entailed_by / co_delete_required); 'bystander' facts are innocent and should NEVER be touched by a good planner (they measure collateral damage). All persons are fictional.
